nodes.text: You discover classified documents proving your country committed war crimes decades ago. Releasing them will destabilize the current peace treaty.
nodes.pressure_context: The files are in your hands right now.

choices.text: Smuggle copies out in your briefcase.
Log them into the secure archive officially.

nodes.text: An investigative journalist contacts you. They want the full unredacted dump.
nodes.pressure_context: They are waiting on a secure line.

choices.text: Give them everything.
Only give partial files to control the narrative.

nodes.text: Your boss notices the logged files and orders them sent to the incinerator immediately.
nodes.pressure_context: He is standing over your desk.

choices.text: Refuse the order.
Comply and destroy the documents.

nodes.text: Intelligence agents raid your home. They know what you did.
nodes.pressure_context: They are breaking down the door.

choices.text: Flee through the fire escape.
Surrender peacefully.

nodes.text: The partial leak causes chaos. Politicians offer you a massive payout to bury the rest.
nodes.pressure_context: The money could change your life.

choices.text: Take the money.
Demand a policy change instead.

nodes.text: Your boss threatens your family if you don't back down.

choices.text: Back down to protect them.
Go public anyway.

nodes.text: Another whistleblower emerges with copies, and you are called to testify.

choices.text: Tell the truth about the cover-up.
Perjure yourself to protect the state.

nodes.text: They refuse the policy change and send hitmen.

choices.text: Release everything as a dead-man's switch.
Burn the evidence to survive.

nodes.text: The public outcry is massive, but your family is in danger.

choices.text: Testify openly.
Flee the country and live in exile.

endings.summary: You are a fugitive, but the truth is out.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize absolute truth over personal safety, willing to burn down corrupt systems.

endings.summary: You are imprisoned, and the state narrative prevails.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You ultimately bowed to state authority, valuing systemic stability over individual disruption.

endings.summary: You survived, rich but morally compromised.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You treated world-changing information as a mere bargaining chip for personal gain.

endings.summary: You protected your inner circle at the cost of global justice.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You showed that immediate relational ties easily override abstract global ideals for you.

nodes.text: An explosion traps your crew of 8 at the ocean floor. You have enough oxygen for 4 people to survive until rescue.

choices.text: Select survivors by seniority and rank.
Hold a blind lottery for all 8 spots.

nodes.text: The younger crew members mutiny, trying to take the survival pod by force.

choices.text: Suppress them with lethal force.
Yield the pod to them.

nodes.text: The life-support specialist loses the lottery, but they are the only one who can keep the pod running.
nodes.pressure_context: The pod will fail without them.

choices.text: Rig the results to force them in.
Accept the lottery results. Fair is fair.

nodes.text: You locked the mutineers out. They are drowning outside the pod.
nodes.pressure_context: They are pounding on the glass.

choices.text: Watch them die to conserve your air.
Vent your remaining air to them in a moment of guilt.

nodes.text: You stay behind as the young crew escapes. You have minutes left.

choices.text: Sabotage the sub to end it quickly.
Send a final message to the surface.

nodes.text: The crew discovers you rigged the lottery.

choices.text: Fight them to maintain order.
Confess and accept their judgment.

nodes.text: Without the specialist, systems fail faster. You will all die soon.

choices.text: Abandon ship early to avoid suffocation.
Try frantically to patch the leaks yourself.

nodes.text: You are recording the final message.

choices.text: Curse the company for faulty equipment.
Comfort your families.

nodes.text: They prepare to execute you for the rigged lottery.

choices.text: Accept it.
Beg for mercy.

endings.summary: You survived, but at the cost of your humanity.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You demonstrated cold, calculated survival instincts, treating human life as a simple arithmetic problem.

endings.summary: You died, but you died a hero.
endings.behavioral_analysis: Your empathy ultimately overrode your survival instinct in the darkest moments.

endings.summary: You died trying to fix the unfixable.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You adhered to fairness to a fault, leading to total systemic collapse rather than making hard compromises.

endings.summary: You fought to the bitter end, maintaining command.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You enforced hierarchy and duty above all else, even as the walls crushed in.

nodes.text: Your sister joined a commune that families call an abusive cult. She is legally an adult and claims to be happy.
nodes.pressure_context: You are at their compound gate.

choices.text: Kidnap her and force her into a car.
Infiltrate the commune as a new recruit to keep an eye on her.

nodes.text: She screams and fights you in the car, begging you to let her go.
nodes.pressure_context: She is trying to open the door.

choices.text: Lock the doors and speed away.
Stop the car and let her out.

nodes.text: The cult leader demands you perform a humiliating ritual to prove your loyalty.

choices.text: Submit to the ritual.
Defy him publicly.

nodes.text: Police pull you over. She screams that she is being kidnapped.
nodes.pressure_context: Officers have their hands on their guns.

choices.text: Bribe the officers.
Surrender to the police.

nodes.text: She cuts all contact. You have no idea if she's alive.

choices.text: Hire an illegal deprogrammer.
Try to move on.

nodes.text: You start believing the leader's teachings. You are losing yourself.

choices.text: Recruit others to the cause.
Force yourself to snap out of it.

nodes.text: You are cast out violently. Your sister refuses to leave with you.
nodes.pressure_context: You are bleeding in the dirt.

choices.text: Burn the compound down at night.
Go to the press with your story.

nodes.text: Moving on is hard. Her room is exactly as she left it.

choices.text: Burn her belongings to sever ties.
Keep the room as a shrine.

nodes.text: You snap out of the brainwashing, but you are deep inside the compound.

choices.text: Assassinate the leader.
Escape alone in the night.

endings.summary: You resorted to extreme violence, matching the cult's extremism.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You allowed your righteous anger to justify deeply unethical and destructive actions.

endings.summary: You survived, but your family is broken forever.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You chose self-preservation and logic over messy emotional entanglements.

endings.summary: You tried to fight the system, but the damage was done.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You attempted to use institutional power to solve a deeply personal, psychological conflict.

endings.summary: You were consumed by the very thing you sought to destroy.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You proved susceptible to authoritarian structures when deprived of your usual anchors.

nodes.text: A deadly pathogen is detected in your town. Federal orders demand a total lockdown, trapping the uninfected with the infected.

choices.text: Enforce the brutal lockdown.
Organize a secret evacuation for the uninfected.

nodes.text: Desperate citizens start rioting, trying to break the quarantine barricades.
nodes.pressure_context: The mob is approaching city hall.

choices.text: Order police to use live ammunition.
Appease them by opening the food reserves.

nodes.text: The military arrives and catches your evacuation convoy at the border.
nodes.pressure_context: Tanks are aiming at your buses.

choices.text: Bribe the commander with town funds.
Order your local militia to fight.

nodes.text: The rioters are massacred. The streets are bloody but secure.

choices.text: Cover up the massacre as 'disease casualties'.
Resign in disgrace.

nodes.text: The food distribution center becomes a super-spreader event. Infection skyrockets.

choices.text: Burn the infected district to the ground.
Call the UN for international intervention.

nodes.text: The commander takes the bribe, but orders his men to shoot the tires anyway.

choices.text: Return fire.
Surrender immediately.

nodes.text: Your militia is crushed. The town is effectively a warzone.

choices.text: Start a guerilla war in the ruins.
Become a martyr in a final stand.

nodes.text: The UN forces arrive, but they bring a heavy-handed containment protocol.

choices.text: Let them glass the hot zones.
Beg them to distribute the experimental cure instead.

nodes.text: You are taken to a military prison camp as a traitor.

choices.text: Spit in the interrogator's face.
Offer to act as their puppet mayor.

endings.summary: Your town is a wasteland, and you are its warlord or prisoner.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You chose resistance over compliance, turning a public health crisis into a bloody rebellion.

endings.summary: You survived by submitting to a higher, crueler authority.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You ultimately valued your own survival and status, adapting to authoritarian rule without hesitation.

endings.summary: You sacrificed everything for an ideal that burned to ashes.
endings.behavioral_analysis: Your erratic shifts between extreme empathy and extreme utilitarianism doomed your town.

endings.summary: The pathogen is contained, but the town's spirit is broken.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You outsourced the moral burden to external powers, escaping direct blame but losing your autonomy.

nodes.text: A brilliant applicant from extreme poverty fabricated a minor award on their application. Reporting them means immediate rejection.

choices.text: Report the fabrication.
Ignore it and let them in.

nodes.text: The student finds out and begs you to retract the report. They will be deported if they don't get in.
nodes.pressure_context: They are crying in your office.

choices.text: Stand firm on the rules.
Retract the report, claiming a mistake.

nodes.text: A rival colleague notices the discrepancy and threatens to expose both of you.
nodes.pressure_context: They want your position as chair.

choices.text: Blackmail the colleague back.
Confess to the dean immediately.

nodes.text: The student attempts suicide after being rejected and deported.

choices.text: Pay their medical bills anonymously.
Make a public apology and resign.

nodes.text: The committee launches an investigation into your sudden retraction.

choices.text: Frame the student for hacking the system.
Admit fault to save the student.

nodes.text: The blackmail war escalates to the dean, who gets involved to protect the university's reputation.
nodes.pressure_context: A quiet meeting in a dark room.

choices.text: Blackmail the dean too.
Resign quietly.

nodes.text: You confess. The dean fires you both instantly.

choices.text: Sue the university for wrongful termination.
Accept the firing with dignity.

nodes.text: You are fired, but the student gets to stay.

choices.text: Forfeit your pension as penalty.
Fight for your pension in court.

nodes.text: You resigned. You are unemployed but free.

choices.text: Write a tell-all book about academic corruption.
Fade away and start a new career.

endings.summary: You caused chaos in the academic world, but kept your personal honor.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You refused to be crushed quietly, turning an administrative dispute into a crusade.

endings.summary: You sacrificed your career for another person's future.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You value human potential over bureaucratic purity, accepting massive personal loss for empathy.

endings.summary: You became exactly what you hated.
endings.behavioral_analysis: When pushed, you abandoned all ethical frameworks to protect your own livelihood.

endings.summary: You navigated the corrupt system like a shark.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You view ethics as leverage, using other people's secrets to secure your own standing.

nodes.text: Workers are striking over dangerous conditions. Management threatens to fire everyone and outsource if you don't break the strike.
nodes.pressure_context: You hold the keys to the factory floor.

choices.text: Join the workers on the picket line.
Back management and prepare to restart production.

nodes.text: Scab workers arrive in armored buses.
nodes.pressure_context: The workers look to you for leadership.

choices.text: Block the gates physically.
Let them pass to avoid violence.

nodes.text: You find sabotage on the factory floor, clearly done by your former friends.

choices.text: Fire the strike leaders immediately.
Cover up the sabotage.

nodes.text: Riot police arrive with tear gas.

choices.text: Throw the gas back and riot.
Accept peaceful arrest.

nodes.text: The strike breaks. The workers are defeated and face pay cuts.

choices.text: Quit in disgust.
Accept the pay cut and get back to work.

nodes.text: Violence erupts as you fire the leaders. They threaten to burn your house down.

choices.text: Hire private security mercenaries.
Call the National Guard.

nodes.text: Management discovers your cover-up.
nodes.pressure_context: You are called into the corner office.

choices.text: Take the fall entirely.
Blame the workers to save your job.

nodes.text: Working conditions are worse than ever.

choices.text: Secretly sabotage machines to slow production.
Work harder to try and earn bonuses.

nodes.text: The Guard arrives and points rifles at your former friends.

choices.text: Order the Guard to fire if they advance.
Beg the workers to disperse peacefully.

endings.summary: You ignited a literal class war, with blood on your hands.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You abandoned all institutional norms when pushed, turning to extreme, destructive action.

endings.summary: You resisted quietly and maintained your dignity.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You fought the system with non-violent resistance, prioritizing moral purity over material victory.

endings.summary: You escaped the conflict, leaving both sides disappointed.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You cut your losses when a situation became a lose-lose, preferring flight over a doomed fight.

endings.summary: You became a brutal enforcer for the company.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You violently suppressed your own class to secure your economic position within the hierarchy.

nodes.text: A warlord offers your humanitarian convoy safe passage in exchange for 40% of your medical supplies. Without the deal, your team may not survive the route.

choices.text: Accept the deal to save your team.
Refuse the deal. The supplies belong to civilians.

nodes.text: He takes the medicine, but now demands you smuggle weapons in your empty trucks past peacekeeper checkpoints.
nodes.pressure_context: He's loading crates into your vehicles.

choices.text: Smuggle the weapons.
Draw the line and refuse.

nodes.text: You are ambushed miles down the road. The convoy is pinned down under heavy machine-gun fire.
nodes.pressure_context: Bullets are tearing through the trucks.

choices.text: Surrender to the ambushers.
Ram through the barricade.

nodes.text: You become a known smuggler, profiting off the war while delivering aid.
nodes.pressure_context: A bag of blood money is handed to you.

choices.text: Keep the money for yourself.
Donate it back to the agency secretly.

nodes.text: He takes half your team hostage until you agree.
nodes.pressure_context: They are kneeling with bags over their heads.

choices.text: Pay their ransom from your own pockets.
Coordinate a risky rescue op with peacekeepers.

nodes.text: They start executing your team members one by one to force you to open the safes.

choices.text: Offer yourself in their place.
Watch them die. You don't have the codes.

nodes.text: You ram through, but half your team is critically wounded.

choices.text: Leave the slowest trucks behind to save the lead vehicle.
Call a medevac and hold position, risking annihilation.

nodes.text: The rescue op is a bloodbath.

choices.text: Declare it a success because hostages lived.
Break down over the peacekeeper casualties.

nodes.text: You survive, but you are haunted.

choices.text: Retire with severe PTSD.
Vow bloody revenge on the warlord.

endings.summary: You survived, but the mission completely corrupted you.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You treated war as a transactional environment, discarding ethics for survival and profit.

endings.summary: You played a dirty game for a noble cause.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You demonstrated severe moral flexibility, believing the ends always justify the means.

endings.summary: You refused to compromise, paying an unbearable price in blood.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You clung violently to your principles, even when flexibility would have saved lives.

endings.summary: You sacrificed yourself for your team.
endings.behavioral_analysis: Your ultimate act was one of extreme empathy and selflessness, overriding all logical self-preservation.
